hooks.command: input=$(cat); prompt=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.prompt // ""'); if echo "$prompt" | grep -iE '(strona|stron[ę|y]|website|webpage|html|css|javascript|typescript|jsx|tsx|react|vue|angular|frontend|landing|page|design|UI|UX|interfejs|zaprojektuj|stwórz stronę|zrób stronę|kod strony|layout|navbar|header|footer|hero|komponent|component|button|form|menu|grid|flexbox|tailwind|bootstrap|scss|sass)' > /dev/null 2>&1; then skill=$(cat .claude/skills/frontend-design.md 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$skill" ]; then jq -n --arg ctx "$skill" '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "UserPromptSubmit", "additionalContext": ("## Frontend Design Skill - Apply these principles to all frontend work:\n\n" + $ctx)}}'; fi; fi
